title: MCPixelArt
description: Craft pixel masterpieces in Minecraft, export your creations with it, and share your pixelated wonders!
body:
MCPixelArt is an innovative Minecraft mod designed to enhance your pixel art creation experience. This mod seamlessly integrates with the popular WorldEdit mod, providing you with a powerful tool to export your in-game creations as png images.

### Key Features:
- In-Game Pixel Art: Build stunning pixel art directly with pixel-perfect precision in Minecraft to express your creativity. 
- WorldEdit Integration: After completing your pixel art masterpiece, Effortlessly export its into detailed images by WorldEdit selector, preserving every block and color of your masterpiece.
- Export and Share: Once your pixel art masterpiece export is complete, you can share it with the Minecraft community or use it for other creative projects.

### Future Plans:
- Import pixel images and place them in Minecraft.
- Add a drawing board where players can create art and export it.

### Dependencies:
- [WorldEdit](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/worldedit)

### Usage:
1. Take out the wooden axe and execute the ```//sel cuboid``` command.
2. Using a wooden axe, left click to select the first point and right click to select the second point.
3. Use the ```//export <path-to-file>``` command to export your pixel art masterpiece as an image file.

### Demonstration video:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/PexcsBaoZWU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


Whether you're an experienced pixel artist or a Minecraft enthusiast looking to add a new dimension to your creativity, MCPixelArt is the mod you've been waiting for. Download now and turn your virtual world into a canvas of endless possibilities!
